choices.text: Reasoning + Acting — LLM agent pattern alternating thought + tool calls. Loops until done. Use create_react_agent(model, tools) for instant LangGraph agent.

questions.prompt: Agent gives 5 different answers same question; inconsistent. Fix?

choices.text: Better system prompt + temperature reduction. System prompt: define role, behavior, constraints, response format clearly. Temperature 0 for deterministic; 0.3-0.7 for slight variation. Add few-shot examples in system. Constrain tool use. Test repeatedly; iterate prompt. The 'wrong model' assumption is often a 'weak prompt' problem. Pro prompt engineering for agent reliability.

questions.explanation: Stronger system prompt + lower temperature + few-shot examples.
